headline: How The Truist Financial (TFC) Investment Story Is Shifting On Capital, Buybacks And Credit Risk
summary: Truist Financial’s analyst fair value estimate edges to US$57.00 from US$57.11, a small adjustment that still reflects ongoing debate around the risk and reward trade off in the shares. The shift appears alongside recent Street research that balances optimism about excess capital and potential buybacks with questions on guidance, credit risk and execution timing. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces fit together and what to watch to stay aligned with the evolving Truist...

headline: Truist expands Enterprise Payments sales leadership as payments growth accelerates
summary: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today named Geoff Gursel and Steven Shipp to lead key sales segments in its Enterprise Payments business. The appointments expand a segment-aligned leadership model following strong performance in 2025, including 13% growth in treasury management fees. The increase was driven by new client acquisition and deeper relationships, and contributed to higher profitability across Truist's Wholesale businesses.

content.title: Truist expands Enterprise Payments sales leadership as payments growth accelerates
content.summary: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today named Geoff Gursel and Steven Shipp to lead key sales segments in its Enterprise Payments business. The appointments expand a segment-aligned leadership model following strong performance in 2025, including 13% growth in treasury management fees. The increase was driven by new client acquisition and deeper relationships, and contributed to higher profitability across Truist's Wholesale businesses.

thumbnail.caption: Steven Shipp has been named Head of Small Business Payments Sales for Truist, leading the bank payments sales strategy for small business clients with a focus on speed to market and simplification.
